CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL(Onboarding_Attempt_Status_New__c , "Closed") || ISPICKVAL(Onboarding_Attempt_Status_New__c , "Canceled"), Billing_Upsell_Owner_Stamp__r.FirstName & " " & Billing_Upsell_Owner_Stamp__r.LastName, IF(NOT(ISBLANK( Billing_Upsell_Owner_Stamp__c )), Billing_Upsell_Owner_Stamp__r.FirstName & " " & Billing_Upsell_Owner_Stamp__r.LastName, Account__r.Billing_Upsell_Owner__r.FirstName & " " & Account__r.Billing_Upsell_Owner__r.LastName) )
CustomField.label: Billing Upsell Owner
